notes: lucidmotors.com is the consumer site and is heavily JS-rendered (Next.js); per session 3 the 24 image entries for Air/Gravity were flagged needs_scraping. Each Air trim has its own page (/air-pure, /air-touring, /air-grand-touring, /air-sapphire) but the canonical model_page is /air; Gravity has a single /gravity model page. media.lucidmotors.com hosts attachment URLs (e.g., spec-sheet PDFs) that are served with text/html content-type (Next.js wrappers, not direct binaries), so they are not directly fetchable as PDFs by the scraper.
